Caroline.Crops: none/64 15/farmer 64 16 2 {{villager}} 64 18 0/pause 1500/speak {{villager}} "$h Hi there, {{playerName}}!"/speak {{villager}} "Hope I didn't catch you at a bad time."/speak {{villager}} "I saw you were looking for a fresh {{item}}, and wouldn't you know - a ripe one popped up in my garden just this morning!"/speak {{villager}} "$h I took that as a sign it was meant for you, {{playerName}}."/pause 250/playSound give_gift/addItem (O){{itemId}} 1/pause 500/pause 500/emote farmer 20/pause 1000/speak {{villager}} "I'm sure it's nothing like what you could grow out here, but it comes with love all the same."/speak {{villager}} "$h Have a good day, {{playerName}}! And enjoy your {{item}}!"/end
Caroline.Flowers: none/64 15/farmer 64 16 2 {{villager}} 64 18 0/pause 1500/speak {{villager}} "$h Hello, {{playerName}}!"/faceDirection {{villager}} 3/speak {{villager}} "I always love coming out to visit {{farmName}} Farm. You've done such a good job with the place."/faceDirection {{villager}} 0/speak {{villager}} "By the way, someone told me you were looking for a {{item}}."/speak {{villager}} "$h I have some growing in my garden, and I'm happy to share."/pause 250/playSound give_gift/addItem (O){{itemId}} 1/pause 500/pause 500/emote farmer 20/pause 1000/speak {{villager}} "I'm surprised you don't have more flower fields out here, {{playerName}}."/speak {{villager}} "Although I suppose you do need the space for crops."/faceDirection {{villager}} 1/speak {{villager}} "$s Well, I'd better get home. If I leave Abby alone in the kitchen too long, she makes a mess."/faceDirection {{villager}} 0/speak {{villager}} "$h Take care, {{playerName}}!"/end

Harvey.Crops: none/64 15/farmer 64 16 2 {{villager}} 64 18 0/pause 1500/speak {{villager}} "$h Hello {{playerName}}!"/speak {{villager}} "I hope you're doing well."/speak {{villager}} "I'm here because I heard you were in need of a {{item}}."/speak {{villager}} "$h I was picking up some groceries at Pierre's anyway, so I went ahead and grabbed one for you."/pause 250/playSound give_gift/addItem (O){{itemId}} 1/pause 500/pause 500/emote farmer 20/pause 1000/speak {{villager}} "$h Excellent choice in produce, by the way. {{item}} is chock full of nutrients!"/speak {{villager}} "$s Ehem, well, anyways - I'll let you go. I'm sure you have a busy day ahead of you."/speak {{villager}} "$h Don't work yourself too hard, {{playerName}}! I only want you stopping by the clinic for scheduled visits."/end

Pierre.Crops: none/64 15/farmer 64 16 2 {{villager}} 64 18 0/pause 1500/speak {{villager}} "$h Hello {{playerName}}!"/speak {{villager}} "Fine day, isn't it?"/speak {{villager}} "A little birdie told me you were need of a {{item}}."/speak {{villager}} "$h As you know, Pierre's has the finest produce available anywhere - and I picked one out, just for you!"/speak {{villager}} "I'm more than happy to part with it, {{playerName}}. Pierre.Forage: none/64 15/farmer 64 16 2 {{villager}} 64 18 0/pause 1500/speak {{villager}} "$h Hello {{playerName}}!"/speak {{villager}} "You're looking well this morning."/speak {{villager}} "So I saw you posted an ad for {{item}}."/speak {{villager}} "$h As you know, Pierre's always has a fine selection of foraged goods in stock, including {{item}}!"/speak {{villager}} "This one right here can be yours, if you're willing to spare a little extra for the delivery cost."/pause 250/playSound give_gift/addItem (O){{itemId}} 1/pause 500/pause 500/emote farmer 20/pause 1000/speak {{villager}} "$h Wonderful! Abigail.Gems: none/64 15/farmer 64 16 2 {{villager}} 64 18 0/pause 1500/speak {{villager}} "$h Hey {{playerName}}!"/speak {{villager}} "Surprised to see me?"/speak {{villager}} "I saw on the board outside the shop that you wanted {{item}}."/speak {{villager}} "$h It sounded like a good excuse for an adventure, so I ventured into the mines and found one!"/speak {{villager}} "Wanna see?"/pause 250/playSound give_gift/addItem (O){{itemId}} 1/pause 500/pause 500/emote farmer 20/pause 1000/speak {{villager}} "$h Well I'm glad you like it, {{playerName}}!"/speak {{villager}} "This was a fun little quest for me. Abigail.Minerals: none/64 15/farmer 64 16 2 {{villager}} 64 18 0/pause 1500/speak {{villager}} "$h Hey there, {{playerName}}!"/faceDirection {{villager}} 3/faceDirection {{villager}} 2/speak {{villager}} "Man, this place looks so much different now that you've cleared it all out."/speak {{villager}} "$s I kinda miss being able to roam the open fields in the darkness..."/pause 500/emote farmer 40/pause 500/faceDirection {{villager}} 3/faceDirection {{villager}} 0/speak {{villager}} "Uh, anyway - someone told me you were looking for {{item}}!"/speak {{villager}} "$h Got a hankering for a crunchy snack, I see."/pause 250/playSound give_gift/addItem (O){{itemId}} 1/pause 500/pause 500/emote farmer 20/pause 1000/speak {{villager}} "Seriously though. Don't chomp on that unless you wanna break your teeth."/faceDirection {{villager}} 1/speak {{villager}} "$3 Y'know, I remember there was this one time, when I was in high school... I chipped a tooth on some Quartz."/speak {{villager}} "$3 The next morning though, my smile was completely whole again. It was so weird."/speak {{villager}} "$s Kinda like magic or something..."/faceDirection {{villager}} 0/speak {{villager}} "$h *Snort* Sorry, I don't even know what I'm going on about."/speak {{villager}} "Enjoy your {{item}}, {{playerName}}! I'll see you around."/end

Evelyn.Flowers: none/64 15/farmer 64 16 2 {{villager}} 64 18 0/pause 1500/speak {{villager}} "$h Well hello, Dear!"/faceDirection {{villager}} 3/faceDirection {{villager}} 2/speak {{villager}} "It's always a treat to come out and see what you're up to here."/faceDirection {{villager}} 3/faceDirection {{villager}} 0/speak {{villager}} "Your Grandfather would be very proud to see {{farmName}} Farm as it is today, {{playerName}}."/pause 500/emote farmer 32/pause 500/speak {{villager}} "$h Oh, by the way, I come with a delivery for you! Here."/pause 250/playSound give_gift/addItem (O){{itemId}} 1/pause 1000/emote farmer 20/pause 1000/speak {{villager}} "Alex mentioned seeing your advertisement at the board outside Pierre's."/speak {{villager}} "$h Good thing he spotted it, because I don't know if my eyes could make heads or tails of it these days!"/speak {{villager}} "$s I really do need to find those reading glasses of mine..."/speak {{villager}} "Anyway, I hope you enjoy the {{item}}, my Dear."/speak {{villager}} "$h Take care now!"/end

Gus.Crops: none/64 15/farmer 64 16 2 {{villager}} 64 18 0/pause 1500/speak {{villager}} "$h Hey {{playerName}}!"/speak {{villager}} "I was at Pierre's this morning, picking up some ingredients for today's special."/speak {{villager}} "$h I spotted your {{item}} request on the way out. Pam.Fish: none/64 15/farmer 64 16 2 {{villager}} 64 18 0/pause 1500/speak {{villager}} "Hey there, Farmer."/speak {{villager}} "Someone say you was looking for a {{item}}?"/pause 250/playSound give_gift/addItem (O){{itemId}} 1/pause 1000/emote farmer 20/pause 1000/speak {{villager}} "$h Heh, yeah, fished that outta the river myself."/speak {{villager}} "Perks of living next to the water, you'd say."/speak {{villager}} "$s Was pretty crummy fishin' up trash most of the time..."/speak {{villager}} "But hey, guess the river's cleaner now because of it, right?"/end

Lewis.Crops: none/64 15/farmer 64 16 2 {{villager}} 64 18 0/pause 1500/speak {{villager}} "$h Hello there, {{playerName}}!"/speak {{villager}} "I'm happy I caught you before you headed out for the day."/speak {{villager}} "I spotted the ad for {{item}} you left on the bulletin board outside Pierre's."/speak {{villager}} "$h Isn't it nice knowing you can rely on your neighbors whenever you need a helping hand?"/pause 500/emote farmer 32/pause 500/speak {{villager}} "Anyway, I happen to have {{item}} growing in my garden this season, and I'm more than happy to share."/pause 250/playSound give_gift/addItem (O){{itemId}} 1/pause 500/pause 500/emote farmer 20/pause 1000/speak {{villager}} "I do hope it's up to {{farmName}} standards."/speak {{villager}} "$h Well, I'd best be off.
